reasoning: The analysis identifies a high-probability short setup for US30. The higher timeframe (D1) context is firmly bearish after a break of market structure. The stop loss is placed structurally above the invalidation high. Take profit targets are set at sequential sell-side liquidity pools on the M1, M5, and M15 timeframes. The setup aligns with the HTF trend, has clear LTF confirmation, and offers an excellent risk-to-reward ratio. Although occurring in the Asian session, the setup quality is high enough to be considered under the temporary rule suspension.
